parts.text:
Generate a single 2D sprite asset in Unity for a barracks tower.

**Mode A (Sprite only)** — user wants a static 2D sprite, no animation needed.

Requirements:
- Prompt: "Top-down view of a medieval barracks tower for tower defense game, cartoon style similar to Kingdom Rush, stone building with blue roof and a small flag on top, simple clean design with bold colors, game asset icon style, white background, no shadow"
- Output path: Assets/Art/Towers/barracks_tower.png
- Size: 512x512
- After generation completes, ensure the texture import settings are: TextureType=Sprite(2D and UI), SpriteMode=Single, PixelsPerUnit=100, AlphaIsTransparency=true

This is a standalone sprite generation task. Do NOT generate sprite sequences.
401 team not allowed to access model. This team can only access models=['alias-only-proxy-models']. Tried to access glm-5-fp8

description: Subagent auto-save triggered by terminal status: failed
